Uses of Class
com.irurueta.numerical.NumericalException

  • Packages that use NumericalException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.numerical
    This library contains packages for: -numerical algorithms for function optimization (i.e.finding minima/maxima).
    com.irurueta.numerical.fitting  
    com.irurueta.numerical.optimization  
    com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials  
    com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators  
    com.irurueta.numerical.robust
    This package contains robust estimators that can be used to discard outliers for cases where a model of the data is known (i.e.
    com.irurueta.numerical.roots
    This package contains classes to find function roots.
    com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing  

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EvaluationException
      Exception raised when function evaluation fails.
      class  InvalidBracketRangeException
      Exception raised when provided bracket of values is not valid.
      class  LockedException
      Exception raised when an instance is locked.
      class  NotAvailableException
      Exception raised when some value cannot be retrieved, usually because it has not yet been provided or computed.
      class  NotReadyException
      Raised when attempting to do a certain operation and not all parameters have been provided or are correctly set.

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.fitting

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.fitting 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  FittingException
      Raised when a fitter fails to fit a function to provided data.

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.optimization

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.optimization 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  OptimizationException
      Raised when an optimizer cannot find a minimum on a function, usually because of lack of convergence.

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  PolynomialsException
      Base exception for polynomials.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Gets location of minima or maxima (i.e.
      double[] Polynomial.getExtrema(double threshold)
      Gets location of minima or maxima (i.e.
      double[] Polynomial.getMaxima()
      Gets location of maxima in this polynomial.
      double[] Polynomial.getMaxima(double threshold)
      Gets location of maxima in this polynomial.
      double[] Polynomial.getMinima()
      Gets location of minima in this polynmomial.
      double[] Polynomial.getMinima(double threshold)
      Gets location of minima in this polynomial.
      com.irurueta.algebra.Complex[] Polynomial.getRoots()
      Gets roots of polynomial.

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  PolynomialEstimationException
      Exception raised if polynomial estimation fails.

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.robust

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.robust 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  InvalidSubsetRangeException
      Raised if provided range of samples to pick subsets from is invalid.
      class  InvalidSubsetSizeException
      Raised if an invalid subset size is requested on a subset selector
      class  NotEnoughSamplesException
      Raised if there aren't enough samples to make a computation.
      class  RobustEstimatorException
      Raised if estimation on a RobustEstimator fails.
      class  SubsetSelectorException
      Raised if subset selection of samples fails.

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.roots

      Subclasses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.roots 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  RootEstimationException
      Raised when a root estimator cannot determine a root of a polynomial, usually because of lack of convergence

    • Uses of NumericalException in com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing

      class  SignalProcessingException
      Raised when something fails during signal processing.
